strategy: Set up in one Round. Every blade or global you cast makes her Enfeeble your team or heal, so blade and hit the same turn.
Skip damage-over-time entirely. It triggers Stormzilla back at you.
Expect a heal-then-Insane-Bolt every time she is struck, so aim to kill in a single big hit rather than chipping her.
She resists all schools only 10%, so use your strongest school and pile blades and traps for one burst.
Keep the team healthy for the Moon Insane Bolt retaliation, which hits all for up to 1,550.
cheatNotes: Arriving late triggers a Moon Insane Bolt on the whole team for up to 1,550. Come in on Round 1.
Every time you attack her she first heals herself, then Insane Bolts the whole team. Plan for the retaliation and burst her down fast.
Do not use damage-over-time on her. It makes her cast Stormzilla back.
Every blade or global you cast makes her Enfeeble your team or heal herself. Blade the same Round you hit.
